evals.prompt: Turn off all the lights in the kitchen
evals.expected_output: The skill should call device_control to set power=false on kitchen lights. Should first call home_discover if device map isn't cached.

evals.prompt: Set up a morning routine that turns on my kitchen lights to 60% brightness and sets the thermostat to 72 degrees every weekday at 6:45am
evals.expected_output: The skill should parse this into an automation_create call with: schedule trigger (cron: '45 6 * * 1-5'), two actions (kitchen lights brightness 60, thermostat targetTemp 72). Should confirm with user before creating. Should mention the Apple Shortcut registration.

evals.prompt: What automations do I have set up? Can you also suggest some new ones based on my devices?
evals.expected_output: Should call automation_list followed by home_suggest. Should present existing automations clearly, then offer relevant suggestions based on discovered devices.
